nasb.text: and I came to Jerusalem and learned about the evil that Eliashib had done for Tobiah, by preparing a room for him in the courts of the house of God.

esv.text: and came to Jerusalem, and I then discovered the evil that Eliashib had done for Tobiah, preparing for him a chamber in the courts of the house of God.

cnv.text: 回到耶路撒冷，那時我才知道以利亞實在神殿的院子裡，為多比雅預備一間房間那件惡事。

ccb.text: 我返回耶路撒冷后，才得知以利亚实在上帝殿的院内为多比雅预备房间的恶事。
